title: calamintha parviflora
intro: Calamintha parviflora, also known as lesser calamint or small calamint, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calamintha parviflora include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems. Calamintha parviflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
